title: %Error: Internal Error: ...: ../V3Number.cpp:518: Real conversion on non real number

features.name: real-returning function in package
features.description: Code should include a package-level function declared to return real type

features.name: unpacked array as function input parameter
features.description: Code should include a function with an unpacked array input parameter used for string-like data

features.name: localparam initialized with real-returning function call
features.description: Code should include a localparam assigned by calling a function that returns real type

features.name: package import in module
features.description: Code should include a module that imports functions from a package using import statement
